business_ideas.idea: Media company for tech/business — entertaining not informative
Interactive coding course platform for developers teaching developers
Internal company podcasting platform for employee/manager communication
Email newsletters/Mailchimp-style platform for internal company communications
Guided crime/history tours led by retired police officers and law enforcement
Physical challenge/pain tolerance event series — manhood as a service
TV franchise branded experiences/theme parks (Survivor, Challenge, etc.)
Custom museum tours with engaging guides and modern branding
Celebrity/expert fantasy camps and tours (Coach K, influencer models)
Backyard chicken rental service with delivery and ongoing support

predictions.text: Internal communication platforms will be massive opportunities; I want to invest in 20 of these companies
If someone builds Bar stool for tech correctly, it will be a huge hit media company
Course platform valuations staying high because of recurring payments business model
Physical experience tours scale across professions and locations nationwide
